title: Question Carousel: Scope Method
description: Determine scope approach for Phase 1 analysis

question.text: How should the initial scope be defined?

options.label: MVP
options.description: Recommend a minimum viable scope — smallest version that validates the core hypothesis
options.consequences: Fastest to market, focused on learning, may require follow-up releases

options.label: Phased
options.description: Recommend multiple release phases with progressive capability delivery
options.consequences: Balanced approach, clear roadmap, moderate initial delivery time

options.label: Full
options.description: Document complete vision without scoping down — everything in one release
options.consequences: Longest delivery time, highest risk, but delivers complete solution at once
